description: Inductor — RF choke, DC bias feed, power supply filtering, energy storage
common_mistakes: DC resistance (DCR) causes voltage drop — check DCR spec at your operating current
Inductor saturates at high current — operating current must stay below saturation current rating
RF choke self-resonant frequency (SRF) must be above operating frequency or it becomes a capacitor
Do not place inductors next to each other without shielding — mutual coupling causes interference
notes: Value in Henries (H). Common RF choke values: 18nH, 39nH, 100nH. Mark value on schematic.
